storage.value:
Aurora Failover

  1. Check primary writer health via CloudWatch.
  2. Trigger failover: aws rds failover-db-cluster --db-cluster-identifier prod-cluster
  3. Verify new writer.
  4. Update app-tier DNS TTL.

pages.title: Runbook: High CPU on Astronomy-Shop Checkout

storage.value:
Checkout CPU spike

Symptom: p95 latency > 800ms, CPU > 85%.

  1. Inspect traces in SigNoz for slow payment-gateway spans.
  2. Scale checkout deployment to 6 replicas.
  3. Roll back last deployment if recent.

Redis OOM — STALE

This doc references Redis 5. Stack is now Redis 7.

Cert rotation

  1. Issue new cert via ACM.
  2. Update ALB listener.
  3. Verify handshake with openssl s_client.

Kafka lag

  1. Check consumer group offsets.
  2. Scale consumers horizontally.
  3. Inspect broker throughput in SigNoz.

Frontend 5xx

  1. Check nginx access logs.
  2. Verify upstream health.
  3. Review recent deployments in last 2h.

IAM rotation — OUTDATED

References AWS access keys. Use IAM Roles for Service Accounts instead.

CH disk full

  1. Drop oldest partitions.
  2. Increase EBS volume.
  3. Verify TTL policies.

ArgoCD stuck

  1. Force refresh application.
  2. Check resource hooks.
  3. Review webhook secrets.

DDoS

  1. Enable AWS Shield Advanced rule.
  2. Add WAF rate-limit rule.
  3. Page on-call lead.

Handoff

  • Review open incidents.
  • Acknowledge active pages.
  • Read last 7d incident log.

EKS node NotReady

  1. Check kubelet status.
  2. Drain and cycle node.
  3. Review ASG health.

Datadog agent

We migrated off Datadog to SigNoz in 2024. Archive this.

Payment timeout

  1. Check gateway health endpoint.
  2. Review circuit breaker state.
  3. Failover to backup provider.

Log pipeline

  1. Check otel-collector queue depth.
  2. Increase batch size.
  3. Drop high-cardinality labels.

Secret leak

  1. Rotate compromised credentials immediately.
  2. Audit CloudTrail for unauthorized use.
  3. File incident report within 1h.

Canary fail

  1. Auto-rollback should fire at 5% error rate.
  2. If not, manual rollback via ArgoCD.
  3. Page release manager.

Cost spike

  1. Check Cost Explorer for top movers.
  2. Identify runaway workload.
  3. Set emergency budget alert.

DNS propagation

Note: references Route53 console flow. Current workflow uses Terraform only.

Postmortem

  • Summary
  • Timeline
  • Root cause
  • Remediation
  • Action items
